name: Mike's Arcade
short_description: New 3D games inspired by classic arcade favorites, complete with game cabinets. Blast foes, navigate mazes, rotate blocks, race at high speed, deflect balls, avoid asteroids, match colors, and jump across platforms.
detailed_description:
Enjoy new 3D games inspired by classic arcade favorites, complete with game cabinets. Features include cloud saves, achievements, and a leaderboard for every game. Gamepad, mouse/touch, and keyboard are all supported.

Spitball: Shoot balls to connect same colors and clear the board.
Q*Bird: Hop on tiles to change their color while avoiding predators.
Exterminator: Blast waves of space insects and take out the hive.
Rebound: Deflect the ball to take out bricks, and collect power-ups.
Meteor Strike: Blast asteroids and UFOs, and try to avoid collisions.
Maze Munch: Gobble pellets, and try not to be gobbled.
Hover Racer: Fast paced racing on rollercoaster-style tracks.
Blox: Drop and rotate block pieces to form complete rows.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Czech, Dutch, Greek, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Thai, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Vietnamese, Bangla, Hebrew, Hindi, Indonesian, Persian
